competitors.name: ts-run-types (type)
ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.intersection(
        RT.partial(RT.object({name: RT.string(), age: RT.number(), createdAt: RT.date()})),
        RT.required(RT.pick(RT.object({name: RT.string(), age: RT.number(), createdAt: RT.date()}), ['name']))
      )
    )
